pom.xml.general_idea: Change Java source and target compatibility from 17 to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation fails if source/target remains 17 while using Java 21 specific APIs or if the build environment enforces JDK 21.

pom.xml.general_idea: Set Maven compiler source and target explicitly to 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Ensures the compiler targets Java 21 bytecode, required for running on JDK 21.

src/test/java/nl/optifit/backendservice/.general_idea: Exclude CosmosDB VectorStore auto-configuration to prevent startup failures in the test context due to missing credentials or dependencies.
src/test/java/nl/optifit/backendservice/.why_exists: Spring Boot context fails to start during tests because CosmosDB auto-configuration attempts to initialize a client without valid credentials or required dependencies present in the test environment.
